body:
## Summary
Renames GO:1990334 to a species-agnostic label and adds yeast-specific narrow synonyms, per request in #31636.

- **name**: `Bfa1-Bub2 complex` → `SIN/MEN two-component GAP complex`
- **synonym (NARROW)**: `Bfa1-Bub2 complex` (S. cerevisiae)
- **synonym (NARROW)**: `Byr4-Cdc16 GAP complex` (S. pombe)
- **def**: updated so it matches the species-agnostic label, referencing both the mitotic exit network (MEN, budding yeast) and septation initiation network (SIN, fission yeast), and the Tem1/Spg1 GTPase. Reference PMID:16449187 retained.
- **property_value**: `term_tracker_item` → issue #31636 added.

Note on the definition: the issue listed a revised definition that was textually identical to the existing one. Since the whole point of the rename is species-agnosticism, I made a minimal edit to bring the definition wording in line with the new label (explicitly mentioning both SIN and MEN, and the Tem1/Spg1 GTPase). Happy to revert to the original wording if @ValWood prefers.

## Checklist
- [x] PLAN
- [x] PRE-VALIDATION — `make travis_build` passed pre-edit
- [x] RESEARCH — N/A (label change per curator request; PMID:16449187 already present)
- [x] TERM-SEARCH — confirmed only one matching stanza via `obo-grep.pl`
- [x] DESIGN-PATTERNS — N/A (no compositional axiom changes)
- [x] EDITS — used `obo-checkout.pl` / `obo-checkin.pl`
- [x] RELATIONSHIPS — `is_a GO:1902773` and `part_of GO:0005816` unchanged
- [x] SPECIALIZED-EDITS — N/A
- [x] METADATA — `created_by` / `creation_date` untouched (existing term); added `term_tracker_item`
- [x] AUTOMATED-VALIDATION — `make travis_build` passed post-edit (all SPARQL-QC rules PASS, reasoning OK)
- [x] REFERENCE-VALIDATION — no new PMIDs; existing PMID:16449187 retained
- [x] CHANGES-COMMITTED — single commit touching only `src/ontology/go-edit.obo`

## Test plan
- [x] `cd src/ontology && make travis_build` completes without violations

Closes #31636

title: Rename GO:1990334 Bfa1-Bub2 complex -> 'SIN/MEN two-component GAP complex'
